scripts.test:postgres: BACKEND_KIND=postgres POSTGRES_HOST=localhost POSTGRES_PORT=5432 POSTGRES_DATABASE=test_db POSTGRES_USER=test_user POSTGRES_PASSWORD=test_pw node --test --test-timeout 120000 test-postgres.js
scripts.test:mysql: BACKEND_KIND=mysql MYSQL_HOST=127.0.0.1 MYSQL_PORT=3306 MYSQL_DATABASE=test_db MYSQL_USER=test_user MYSQL_PASSWORD=test_pw node --test --test-timeout 120000 test-mysql.js
scripts.test:dynamodb: BACKEND_KIND=dynamodb DYNAMO_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8000 AWS_REGION=us-east-1 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=fake AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=fake node --test --test-timeout 120000 test-dynamodb.js
scripts.pretest: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans 2>/dev/null; docker compose up -d --wait
scripts.test: npm run test:memory && npm run test:sqlite && npm run test:postgres && npm run test:mysql && npm run test:mongodb && npm run test:dynamodb
